page_content:
GATEWAY REQUIREMENT

MATH120/140/136, BMGT230,

and BMGT220 must be completed Humanities (DSHU)*

with a C- or higher by 45 credits

(AP/IB and dual enrollment credits

excluded).

Upper Level Elective

3

NOTES:

*All students must complete two Distributive Studies (DSxx) courses that are also approved as Big Question (SCIS) courses. Students must also fulfill two Understanding Plural Societies (DVUP) courses or one Understanding Plural Societies (DVUP) course and one Cultural Competence (DVCC) course with courses from Distributive Studies (DSxx).

**BMGT110 is only required for students who enter the Smith School of Business as freshmen. It is recommended for transfer students but not required because the course's content is redundant for students who have not completed the course prior to entering the Smith School.

Effecitve Fall 2024
